title: syzygium courtallense
intro: Syzygium courtallense, also known as the Courtallum cherry or Nilgiri cherry, is a plant species belonging to the family Myrtaceae, native to the Western Ghats of India. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Syzygium courtallense include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Syzygium courtallense is often prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including coughs, colds, and skin conditions.
